data.title: Tristero Research Warns RWA Tokenization Could Trigger ‘On-Chain Subprime Crisis’
data.description:
The tokenized real-world assets market has surged to $26. 5 billion following 70% growth in 2025, yet new research warns that rapid expansion could trigger an "on-chain subprime crisis" through dangerous mismatches between illiquid physical assets and hyper-fast blockchain markets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tristero-research-warns-rwa-tokenization-could-trigger-on-chain-subprime-crisis/

data.title: LBank and CertiK Skynet form a strategic partnership
data.description: LBank has officially announced a strategic partnership with CertiK Skynet. As a centralized exchange integrating CertiK Skynet, LBank will leverage the platform to enhance its security, transparency, and real-time risk monitoring capabilities, creating a more secure and trusted trading environment for users. CertiK Skynet is a real-time, automated security assessment system for Web3 projects, exchanges, and wallets, offering independent review and risk monitoring capabilities.

data.title: Deposit $701,000 to Hyperliquid with a new address and go long on PEPE and WIF with 10x leverage
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the newly created address 0xba06 deposited $701,000 into Hyperliquid and went long on 258 million kPEPE (approximately $2.5 million) and 2.47 million WIF (approximately $2 million) with a 10x leverage.

data.title: BitMine: Not subject to Nasdaq's requirements for crypto treasury companies to raise funds through rights offerings
data.description: BitMine Technologies, an Ethereum treasury company, released a statement regarding its NYSE American listing and access to the capital markets, stating that the company, now listed on the NYSE American, can issue shares through its existing shelf registration without shareholder approval. The existing ATM financing program remains a registered, legal public transaction and does not require shareholder approval to proceed. Therefore, it is not subject to Nasdaq's requirement that listed companies obtain shareholder approval before issuing new shares to purchase cryptocurrencies. This follows news that sources familiar with the matter revealed that Nasdaq is increasing its scrutiny of listed companies that often raise funds to purchase and accumulate cryptocurrencies to inflate their stock prices. (PR Newswire)

data.title: Bunni Addresses September Security Breach and Restores Withdrawal Functionality
data.description:
According to Foresight News, decentralized exchange platform Bunni has released a report on the security breach that occurred on September 2. The team has restored the withdrawal functionality, allowing liquidity providers to access their assets, although other operations such as deposits and trading remain suspended.

The report highlights that a rounding error in the smart contract led to an $8.4 million flash loan vulnerability. Bunni has updated the rounding code to address this issue. The stolen funds were transferred through Tornado Cash, and Bunni is offering a 10% bounty to the attacker for the return of the remaining funds. Additionally, Bunni is collaborating with law enforcement and has requested centralized exchanges to freeze related accounts.

data.title: JustLend DAO Energy Lease Rates Reduced
data.description: According to an official Twitter post, the JustLend DAO platform has reduced its base energy leasing fee from 15% to 8% to reduce user costs. Current market data shows that it now costs only 2.663 TRX to obtain 100,000 Energy (equivalent to approximately 26 SUNs per day). This rate optimization will improve user asset allocation and circulation efficiency.

data.title: A whale address received over 10,000 ETH from Galaxy Digital, worth approximately $44.04 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the whale address 0x829a received 10,039 ETH from Galaxy Digital today, worth approximately US$44.04 million.

data.title: Binance Wallet to List Starpower (STAR) TGE on September 6th
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that Starpower (STAR) will be available as part of its 37th exclusive Token Generation Event (TGE), accessible through PancakeSwap. The event will take place from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM (UTC) on September 6th, requiring participants to use Binance Alpha Points. Furthermore, an additional 17.5 million STAR will be allocated for subsequent activities, with details to be announced later.

data.title: BlockSpaceForce launches cryptocurrency-equity evergreen fund, targeting over $100 million in assets under management
data.description: On September 5th, BlockSpaceForce announced the establishment of a crypto-equity evergreen hedge fund. Established as a subsidiary of a Singapore-licensed VCC, the fund has completed its own capital injection and aims to achieve over $100 million in assets under management (AUM). BlockSpaceForce has already directly invested in several crypto-equity stocks, including NAKA, SBET, FGNX, BNC, and StablecoinX, and has exposure to assets such as BTC, ETH, SOL, and BNB. The BlockSpaceForce team combines crypto-native backgrounds with traditional finance experience, with core members hailing from Coinbase, CoinMarketCap, Foundry, 3G Capital, and Aspen Digital. The evergreen fund structure provides flexibility across market cycles, focusing on investment opportunities in the US, Asia, and global markets.

data.title: Cipher Mining Reports August Bitcoin Production and Future Projections
data.description:
According to PANews, Cipher Mining, a Nasdaq-listed mining company, has released its operational data for August. The Black Pearl Phase I project contributed approximately 39% to the total Bitcoin production. The company anticipates reaching a computing power of 10 exahashes per second (EH/s) by the end of the third quarter, which will increase its total self-mining capacity to around 23.5 EH/s.

The detailed figures for August include a mining output of approximately 241 Bitcoin (BTC), with 42 BTC sold and 1,414 BTC held. Cipher Mining deployed around 115,000 mining machines, achieving an operational computing power of approximately 23.0 EH/s by the end of the month. The equipment efficiency was recorded at about 17.3 joules per terahash (J/TH).

data.title: Sora Ventures announces the launch of a Bitcoin reserve fund, aiming to purchase $1 billion in Bitcoin within six months
data.description: According to Bitcoin Magazine, Sora Ventures announced the launch of a Bitcoin reserve fund during Taipei Blockchain Week. Backed by $200 million in commitments from partners and investors across Asia, the fund plans to acquire $1 billion worth of Bitcoin over the next six months. This initiative reportedly follows the success of other Asian Bitcoin reserve companies, including Metaplanet of Japan, Moon Inc. of Hong Kong, DV 8 of Thailand, and BitPlanet of South Korea. Unlike these companies, which hold Bitcoin directly on their balance sheets, Sora Ventures' reserve fund will serve as a centralized pool of institutional capital, aiming to support existing businesses and foster the establishment of similar reserve funds globally.

data.title: Binance Wallet to Launch 37th Exclusive TGE with Starpower (STAR)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Wallet will launch the 37th Exclusive TGE Starpower (STAR) via PancakeSwap.The subscription period will be September 6, 2025, from 8AM to 10AM (UTC).Eligible users will need to use Binance Alpha Points to participate and there will be an allocation of additional 17,500,000 STAR for upcoming campaigns, with details coming soon. TGE details and the Event Portal will be also be released soon.

data.title: Binance HODLer Airdrop Launches on OpenLedger (OPEN)
data.description: The 36th Binance HODLer Airdrop, OpenLedger (OPEN), is now live. OpenLedger is an AI blockchain dedicated to providing liquidity for the monetization of data, models, and agents. Users who subscribe to guaranteed-principal-earning products (fixed, demand, or on-chain) with BNB between 08:00 on August 18, 2025, and 07:59 on August 22, 2025 (UTC), will receive an OPEN airdrop. Tokens will be distributed to users' spot wallets at least one hour before trading begins. Binance will launch OPEN at 21:00 on September 8, 2025 (UTC), opening trading pairs for USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY. Seed tag trading rules will apply. OPEN deposits will open at 17:30 on September 5 (UTC). This HODLer airdrop includes 10 million OPEN tokens, representing 1.00% of the maximum token supply. The circulating supply at listing is 215.5 million OPEN, representing 21.55% of the maximum supply.
